recipes.name: Classic Cheeseburger
ingredients_full: salt and black pepper, to taste
instructions: Season 1 lb ground beef with salt and black pepper and divide into 4 patties.
Cook patties in a skillet over medium-high heat for 3 to 4 minutes per side.
Add cheddar during the last minute so it melts.
Toast burger buns if desired.
Assemble burgers with lettuce, tomato, onion, pickles, ketchup, and mustard.
chef_upgrade: Toast the buns in butter.
Add caramelized onions.
Use a burger sauce made with mayo, ketchup, mustard, and chopped pickles.

recipes.name: Garlic Chicken Rice Bowl
ingredients_full: salt and black pepper, to taste
instructions: Cook 1 cup rice according to package directions.
Season 2 chicken breasts with salt and black pepper.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Cook chicken for 6 to 7 minutes per side until fully cooked.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add butter and soy sauce if using.
Serve sliced chicken over rice with green onion and broccoli.
chef_upgrade: Marinate the chicken in soy sauce, garlic, and lemon for 30 minutes.
Finish with a little butter for shine.
Top with crispy garlic or sesame seeds.

recipes.name: Sheet Pan Chicken and Veggies
ingredients_full: salt and black pepper, to taste
instructions: Heat oven to 425°F.
Toss chicken, potatoes, carrots, and broccoli with olive oil and seasonings.
Spread everything on a sheet pan.
Roast for 30 to 35 minutes, until chicken is cooked through and vegetables are tender.
chef_upgrade: Use bone-in chicken thighs for more flavor.
Finish with fresh herbs and lemon juice.
Preheat the sheet pan for deeper browning.

recipes.name: Classic Beef Chili
ingredients_full: cheddar or sour cream for topping
salt and black pepper, to taste
instructions: Brown ground beef in a pot over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic and cook until softened.
Stir in diced tomatoes, tomato paste, beans, cumin, paprika, chili flakes, and broth.
Simmer for 25 to 30 minutes until thickened.
Serve with cheddar or sour cream if desired.
chef_upgrade: Let the chili simmer longer for deeper flavor.
Use a mix of beef and sausage.
Top with green onion, avocado, or tortilla strips.

recipes.name: Turkey Club Sandwich
ingredients_full: salt and black pepper, to taste
instructions: Toast the bread if desired.
Cook bacon until crisp if using.
Spread mayonnaise on bread.
Layer turkey, bacon, lettuce, tomato, and cheese.
Cut and serve.
chef_upgrade: Use good deli turkey or roasted turkey breast.
Season tomato lightly with salt and pepper.
Add avocado or herb mayo.

recipes.name: Chicken Tacos
ingredients_full: 1 lb chicken breast or thighs, diced
salt and black pepper, to taste
instructions: Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Cook onion and garlic for 2 minutes.
Add chicken, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Cook until chicken is fully done, about 8 to 10 minutes.
Warm tortillas in a dry pan.
Fill tortillas with chicken mixture and top with avocado, cilantro, cheese, and lime.
chef_upgrade: Char the tortillas briefly in a dry skillet.
Make quick pickled onions with vinegar and salt.
Add a crema with sour cream and lime.

recipes.name: Pasta with Garlic and Olive Oil
ingredients_full: salt and black pepper, to taste
instructions: Cook pasta in salted water until al dente.
Reserve 1/2 cup pasta water before draining.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over low heat.
Add garlic and cook gently until fragrant, not browned.
Toss pasta with garlic oil and a little pasta water.
Finish with parmesan, parsley, red pepper flakes, and lemon if desired.
chef_upgrade: Use high-quality olive oil.
Finish with lemon zest.
Toast breadcrumbs for a crunchy topping.
